name_en: Bottega Veneta 24SS Woven Zip Crossbody Bag. A crossbody bag that doubles as a makeup pouch, featuring exquisite weaving and a compact body. It is an essential accessory for the upcoming summer. The double zipper offers better protection, and the large capacity makes it a must-have.
name_cn:
Bottega Veneta 24SS Woven Zip Crossbody Bag. A crossbody bag that doubles as a makeup pouch, featuring exquisite weaving and a compact body. It is an essential accessory for the upcoming summer. The double zipper offers better protection, and the large capacity makes it a must-have.
Style No.: 789109
Dimensions: 22*12.5*5cm
